{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/54299088?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Koukyosyumei", "id": 54299088, "login": "Koukyosyumei", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU0Mjk5MDg4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Koukyosyumei", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42078", "cvss": {"score": 4.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Summary

The `markdown_table_to_image` tool accepts a caller-controlled path parameter and passes it directly to `get_html_table_image`:

```python
# pptagent/mcp_server.py:127-143
def markdown_table_to_image(markdown_table: str, path: str, css: str) -> str:
    """
    Args:
        path (str): The file path where the image will be saved
    """
    html = markdown_to_html(markdown_table)
    get_html_table_image(html, path, css)           # ← no path validation
    return f"Markdown table converted to image and saved to {path}"

# pptagent/utils.py:337-366
def get_html_table_image(html: str, output_path: str, css: str = None):
    parent_dir, base_name = os.path.split(output_path)
    if parent_dir and not os.path.exists(parent_dir):
        os.makedirs(parent_dir)                     # ← creates arbitrary directories
    hti = Html2Image(...)
    hti.screenshot(
        html_str=html,
        css_str=css,
        save_as=base_name,                          # ← writes image to any directory
        size=(1000, 600),
    )
```

`os.makedirs(parent_dir)` creates arbitrary directory trees, and `Html2Image.screenshot` writes the rendered image to `parent_dir/base_name`. Unlike `download_file` in the same project, there is no `is_relative_to(workspace)` guard. This behaviour can be fixed with the same pattern as the above.


### Impact

The concrete attack scenarios include

- SSH key replacement: `path = "/home/user/.ssh/authorized_keys"` — replaces the authorized_keys file with an image binary (breaks - SSH but could be an image crafted with a specific PNG/JPEG payload).
- Web shell: `path = "/var/www/html/uploads/shell.php"` — writes the rendered PNG there; the file has the .php extension but PNG content; combined with Apache Options +MultiViews or file-include vulnerabilities could be dangerous.
- Directory creation oracle: `path = "/root/test/probe.png"` — if the directory is created, confirms the target path exists; if it errors, reveals permissions information.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00198, "percentile": 0.09685}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hrcw-xc63-g29m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T18:55:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hrcw-xc63-g29m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hrcw-xc63-g29m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42078"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-04T17:16:24Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T18:55:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/security/advisories/GHSA-hrcw-xc63-g29m", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42078", "https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/commit/418491a9a1c02d9d93194b5973bb58df35cf9d00", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hrcw-xc63-g29m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/icip-cas/PPTAgent/security-advisories/GHSA-hrcw-xc63-g29m", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent", "summary": "PPTAgent: Arbitrary File Write + Directory Creation via markdown_table_to_image", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T18:55:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hrcw-xc63-g29m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.1.36", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pptagent"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.1.36"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: PPTAgent: Arbitrary File Write + Directory Creation via markdown_table_to_image
